title: Upon Mease. Epig.
content:
Mease brags of pullets which he eats: but Mease
    Ne'er yet set tooth in stump or rump of these.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Mease. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
